title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 7 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 08/02/2023
Image reference: 2023-02-08_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-february-7-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Panamax and Handy values have softened
Supramax Bonita (58,100 DWT, Sep 2010, Tsuneishi Zhoushan) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 15.80 mil, VV Value USD 15.52 mil - BWTS. Handy BC African Venture (34,700 DWT, Jun 2012, Chengxi Shipyard) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 12.90 mil, VV Value USD 13.41 mil - SS/DD Passed. Handy BC AS Elenia (34,400 DWT, Sep 2011, SPP) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 13.30 mil, VV Value USD 13.63 mil - BWTS.
